title: Ginger Ray Romantic Valentines Decoration Kit with Balloons and Petals
features: The perfect way to fill the room is with this heart balloon decorating kit. Perfect for at home or a valentines hotel night away!
Each Valentine's Balloon Decorating kit contains 25 Balloons with heart tassel streamers and confetti
Part of the Ginger Ray collection!
description: Product Description Fill your room with love this Valentines with our gorgeous heart shaped balloons. The ultimate Valentines day decorations that are bound to impress. Every balloon comes with a gorgeous heart shaped tail to add even more wow factor to the room. Perfect to decorate at home or a hotel room for a valentines night away! Each Valentine's Balloon Decorating kit contains 15 x 18 matte foil heart shaped balloons 10 x 5" heart shaped latex balloons 15 heart tassels and heart shaped confetti.
